subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness! Praise be unto God - His providence hath encompassed all, and His mercy hath outstripped all else [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی علیک بهائی و عنایتی لله الحمد عنایتش احاطه نموده و رحمتش سبقت گرفته و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @naming of children; of individuals
